steps.t: Amarion has pointed you to a cache of weapon-lore scrolls he says is hidden within the Black Dens, south-east of Echad Dagoras. He believes it should …
Amarion said the cache of weapon-lore scrolls would be buried about fifty paces west of the rune-marked cavern.
Amarion is at Echad Dagoras, north-west of the Black Dens. You have discovered the Rangers' cache and dug up the scrolls of lore hidden there. Now you…
